{{Infobox character
| name = Min Shuei
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|silver flash inside her soul that can cleanse techniques}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Winter Sage]], [[Sage]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|, Sage of Frozen Blade}}
| professions = {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|peacemaker}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|, teacher}}
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Uncrowned (novel)|Uncrowned]]
}}

''See also: [[Min Shuei Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Min Shuei, also known as the [[Winter Sage]] or the [[Sage]] of the [[Frozen Blade]], is a powerful combatant characterized by her white hair, tanned skin, and white robes. She utilizes ice-based [[sword madra]] and authority to manipulate her surroundings, often manifesting frost or blizzards during combat. Known for being highly volatile and wearing her emotions openly, she can transition rapidly between states of intense fury, sorrow, and passion. Despite this perceived childishness in her disposition, she is a formidable force capable of engaging in high-level combat and tearing apart illusions. Her role involves training [[Yerin]], whom she believes should be mentored by a [[Sword Sage]], and leading Archlords in battle. She has demonstrated significant skill in combat against entities such as the [[Dreadgod]] and [[Charity]], though she can be overwhelmed by advanced techniques.}}

== Uncrowned ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Min Shuei]] is the [[Winter Sage]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c9">''Uncrowned'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Min Shuei]] watched [[Yerin]]'s battle.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c18">''Uncrowned'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Min Shuei's sword]] is a twin to [[Yerin]]'s.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c18" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Known as the [[Sage]] of [[Frozen Blade]], Min Shuei is a [[Sage]] who carries two identical swords, one of which is white. While present in the room, Min Shuei suggested that [[Yerin]] hold a baby rabbit and later provided her with instructions, even nodding behind [[Charity]] during the process. The [[Sage]] acted as a peacemaker and directed [[Yerin]] to hunt down her [[Overlord revelation]], believing that [[Lindon]] possessed the ability to win. During this time, Min Shuei appealed to several [[Monarchs]] to have the [[Blood Sage]] removed, though the [[Sage]] eventually found themselves restrained by [[Charity]] and engaged in arguments with her.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">14</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Min Shuei]] is also referred to as the [[Sage]] of [[Frozen Blade]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c7">''Wintersteel'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Min Shuei]] uses a white [[sword]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Min Shuei]] is a [[Sage]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Min Shuei]] suggested that [[Yerin]] hold the baby rabbit.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8">''Wintersteel'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Min Shuei]] is present in the room.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Min Shuei]] appealed to several [[Monarchs]] to have the [[Blood Sage]] removed.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c11">''Wintersteel'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Min Shuei]] believed [[Lindon]] could win.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c17">''Wintersteel'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Min Shuei]] nodded behind [[Charity]] while instructing [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c19">''Wintersteel'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Min Shuei]] directed [[Yerin]] to hunt down her [[Overlord revelation]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c20">''Wintersteel'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Min Shuei]] acts as a peacemaker.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c21">''Wintersteel'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Min Shuei]] can teach [[Yerin]] almost anything.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c22">''Wintersteel'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Min Shuei]] carries two identical swords.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c24">''Wintersteel'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Min Shuei]] was restrained by [[Charity]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c25">''Wintersteel'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Min Shuei]] is a character who argues with [[Charity]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c26">''Wintersteel'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Dreadgod ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Min Shuei]] has a silver flash inside her soul that can cleanse techniques.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c16">''Dreadgod'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Waybound ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Min Shuei]] is a teacher.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c8">''Waybound'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Min Shuei]] has white hair.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c10">''Waybound'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Min Shuei]] is irritated by how much the [[Lindon]] illusion talks.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c10" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|“You want to hold the bunny?” Min Shuei suggested.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|“Cycle it to your head,” Charity instructed, with Min Shuei nodding rapidly behind her.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c19" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
